posts.text: No other tycoon in Africa has the balance-sheet to fund such wide-ranging projects. But whether it is best for the continent to have a single Ambani or Rockefeller, rather than a panoply of competing moguls, is far from clear https://www.economist.com/middle-east-and-africa/2026/03/17/africas-richest-man-has-ambitious-plans-for-the-continent?taid=69be4b57fec6580001a808d1&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text: I have some high value innovations that  Amazon basics will be all over.  Plus with his manufacturing plans he must consider the role of fractal graphene in the evolution of manufacturing.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
